name: sc-js
description: JS knowledge provider: detects runtime (web/desktop), framework (Nuxt/Vue/Alpine/Vite/Astro), ORMs and capabilities, then emits a pivot manifeste. /sc-js:audit delegates code review to aidd-dev:reviewer using capability pivots as criteria. Perf pivots for web-optimize, data pivots for data-optimize. Run sniff on any JS project; run audit to review JS code quality against best practices.
